bio.title: bio
bio.description:
I'm a Masters 1 Computer Science student specialized in Cyber Security at the Higher School of Computer Science and Technology (ESTIN) in Bejaia, Algeria.

I've completed internships at Sonatrach, Enafor DZ, Algérie Télécom and SETRAM, building a strong professional background. Skilled in backend development with FastAPI and Django.
